form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 5th (Fr4) over 1710m after showing early speed at Ballarat was 2nd-2.77 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Te Amo (2:09.50) in NR up to 49 on April 9 at $10. Before that 6th (Fr2) over 2190m at Maryborough was 4th-9.1 at the bell, beaten 17 m by Piesridingshotgun (2:45.40) in NR 48 to 52 on March 30 at $81. Improvement needed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait after the start.

form.formComment: Good run 12 metres fifth behind Against The Bridle at Cranbourne over 2080m NR up to 50 on March 29. Failed to finish behind Paris Kay on April 3 at Cranbourne over 2080m NR up to 50. Draws well and can show more third up.

formComments.comment: Good run 12 metres fifth behind Against The Bridle at Cranbourne over 2080m NR up to 50 on March 29. Failed to finish behind Paris Kay on April 3 at Cranbourne over 2080m NR up to 50. Draws well and can show more third up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled up in the back straight due to a flat tyre.
Broke gait shortly after the start commenced.
Held up for clear running on the final turn prior to utilising the sprint lane.
Raced keenly throughout the event. Shifted ground in the home straight.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr3) over 2190m after showing early speed at Maryborough beaten 21 m by With Aplomb (2:44.50) in NR up to 55 M on April 10 at $151. Before that 7th (Sr1) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 6th-15.2 beaten 18 m by Manda Kyvalley (2:04.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $41. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start despite the efforts of its driver.
Gallopped clear of interference near the 500m.

form.formComment: Last start by a head (Sr1) at Ballarat (2:09.50) beating Chillhunnybunny in NR up to 49 on April 9 at $4.80 at the bell was 5th-7.13. Going well and could strike again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke in the score up and out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fourth behind Dels Destiny at this track over 2180m in a NR 50 to 55 on April 2 at $7. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3 m finishing third behind Settle The Bill at Maryborough over 1690m in a NR 48 to 52 on April 10 at $7. Working up to a win.

form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start 6th (Fr7) over 1650m at Bendigo beaten 25 m by Kyvalley Jagger (2:00.10) in 0-3 WINs on April 8 at $8. form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. His previous first-up run was successful when he posted a big 6 m win when driven back in the field, (Fr7) held up early, at Shepparton (2:09.20) beating Taken By Wine in MAIDEN on June 17 at $5.50. Probably needs this hitout.
